Our Story

Where Beauty
Meets Light

Urban Charm was born from a passion for bringing premium beauty and lifestyle products to Dhaka. We curate the finest Korean skincare — trusted brands like COSRX — alongside stunning aesthetic lighting pieces that transform any space.

Every product is hand-picked for quality and charm, because we believe that how you feel and how your space looks both matter deeply.
